case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS BARANDA ANITA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BARANDA ANITA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARANDA ANITA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARANDA ANITA $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $446.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARANDA ANITA
